description: An indoor photograph of a tan and brown working dog on a leash held by an officer in a dark uniform, the dog carrying a black training-bumper toy in its mouth. Behind them, fanned bundles of U.S. currency sit on a counter beside a printed placard reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Atlanta Port of Entry. The officer's duty belt with keys and a holster is visible.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Atlanta Port of Entry
